name: nx9
description: NX9 — AI node workflow studio (Web-first, Electron-ready)

scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @nx9/shared build && concurrently -n server,web -c magenta,cyan "pnpm --filter @nx9/server dev" "pnpm --filter @nx9/web dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @nx9/shared build && pnpm --filter @nx9/server build && pnpm --filter @nx9/web build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @nx9/shared typecheck && pnpm --filter @nx9/server typecheck && pnpm --filter @nx9/web typecheck
